name: create_ticket
description: Create a new support ticket in Freshdesk. Specify the requester, subject, description, priority, and status. Tickets can originate from email, phone, portal, or API and enter the agent queue for resolution.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: The subject line of the ticket.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: HTML or plain-text description of the issue.
parameters.example: Customer reports that their credit card is being declined when trying to upgrade their plan.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address of the requester. Creates a new contact if not found.

parameters.name: responder_id
parameters.description: ID of the agent to assign the ticket to.

body.subject: Unable to process payment
body.description: Customer reports that their credit card is being declined when trying to upgrade their plan.
